caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" and a circular logo printed on the front sits at a dark table. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring a logo with stars and the text "URBAN HUSTLE," while a blue sign above him reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". He rests his clasped hands on the table, revealing a gold watch on his left wrist. In front of him is a professional microphone on a boom arm, and to his right sits a dark container with a red and blue label that says "TALK OUT". A small black device with a red logo is visible on the left side of the table. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a nearly static position, maintaining a slight smile and looking toward someone off-screen to his left.
